description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a classic upright design with a rectangular screen area and a control panel below it. The front panel is decorated with vibrant, cartoon-style artwork, prominently featuring Bomberman characters and Japanese text, suggesting a themed game. The control panel includes two red buttons, but no joystick is visible, and the screen is set within a black bezel. The side panels are adorned with colorful, action-packed graphics that extend the Bomberman theme, with dynamic poses and comic-style effects. The cabinet is primarily constructed from black material, with the artwork providing bright accents of green, yellow, and purple. The back of the cabinet is plain and unadorned, emphasizing its functional, utilitarian structure.
description: A classic upright arcade game cabinet with Bomberman-themed artwork, a rectangular screen, and a control panel with two red buttons. The sides are decorated with colorful graphics, while the back is plain black.
description_view_0: Front view showing the screen, two red control buttons, and vibrant Bomberman-themed artwork below the controls.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the colorful, cartoon-style Bomberman graphics and Japanese text covering the entire side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, solid black surface with no visible artwork or features.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with matching Bomberman graphics and text, and a partial view of the control panel.
attribute_screen_type: unknown (rectangular, flat, with a black bezel; no visible curvature or display technology details)
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two red buttons arranged diagonally on a flat panel; no joystick or additional controls visible; single-player layout implied.
attribute_marquee_artwork: None; the top of the cabinet is solid black with no illuminated marquee or distinct artwork.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels feature vibrant, cartoon-style Bomberman graphics with Japanese text, comic-style effects, and a colorful palette of green, yellow, and purple.
